@startuml
title SEBI Circular Compliance Assessment Sequence

autonumber

actor "Administrators" as Administrators
actor "Analysts" as Analysts
actor "Compliance officers" as ComplianceOfficers
actor "Control owners" as ControlOwners
actor "Auditors" as Auditors

participant "SEBI publication channels" as SEBI
participant "Enterprise identity provider" as IdentityProvider
participant "Governance and repository systems" as GovernanceSystems

participant "Circular Acquisition and Parsing" as CircularAcquisition
participant "Requirement Extraction" as RequirementExtraction
participant "Compliance Inventory and Control Mapping" as ControlMapping
participant "Gap Analysis" as GapAnalysis
participant "Impact Assessment" as ImpactAssessment
participant "Findings Review and Reporting" as FindingsReview

database "Circular archive" as CircularArchive
database "Clause catalog" as ClauseCatalog
database "Compliance inventory" as ComplianceInventory
database "Assessment records" as AssessmentRecords
database "Audit history" as AuditHistory

== Circular acquisition and parsing ==

Administrators -> IdentityProvider: Authenticate
IdentityProvider --> Administrators: Identity confirmed
Administrators -> CircularAcquisition: Initiate circular monitoring
CircularAcquisition -> SEBI: Monitor for latest circulars
SEBI --> CircularAcquisition: Provide published circulars
CircularAcquisition -> CircularArchive: Archive circulars
CircularAcquisition -> CircularAcquisition: Parse circulars into clauses
CircularAcquisition -> ClauseCatalog: Store parsed clauses
CircularAcquisition -> AuditHistory: Record circular acquisition and parsing
CircularAcquisition -> RequirementExtraction: Submit parsed clauses

== Requirement extraction and control mapping ==

RequirementExtraction -> RequirementExtraction: Extract new compliance requirements
RequirementExtraction -> ClauseCatalog: Store extracted requirements
RequirementExtraction -> AuditHistory: Record requirement extraction
RequirementExtraction -> ControlMapping: Submit extracted requirements

ControlMapping -> ComplianceInventory: Retrieve existing compliance setup and controls
ComplianceInventory --> ControlMapping: Existing compliance inventory
ControlMapping -> GovernanceSystems: Retrieve governance and repository information
GovernanceSystems --> ControlMapping: Existing governance and control information
ControlMapping -> ControlOwners: Validate requirement-to-control mappings
ControlOwners --> ControlMapping: Confirm control mappings
ControlMapping -> ComplianceInventory: Update requirement-to-control mappings
ControlMapping -> AuditHistory: Record control mapping
ControlMapping -> GapAnalysis: Submit requirements and mapped controls

== Gap and impact assessment ==

GapAnalysis -> GapAnalysis: Assess compliance gaps
GapAnalysis -> AssessmentRecords: Store gap assessment
GapAnalysis -> AuditHistory: Record gap assessment
GapAnalysis -> ImpactAssessment: Submit requirements and identified gaps

ImpactAssessment -> ControlOwners: Request IT and operational impact input
ControlOwners --> ImpactAssessment: Provide IT and operational impact input
ImpactAssessment -> ImpactAssessment: Assess IT and operational impacts
ImpactAssessment -> AssessmentRecords: Store impact assessment
ImpactAssessment -> AuditHistory: Record impact assessment
ImpactAssessment -> FindingsReview: Submit gap and impact findings

== Findings review and publication ==

Analysts -> IdentityProvider: Authenticate
IdentityProvider --> Analysts: Identity confirmed
Analysts -> FindingsReview: Review assessment findings
FindingsReview -> AssessmentRecords: Retrieve gap and impact assessments
AssessmentRecords --> FindingsReview: Assessment results
FindingsReview --> Analysts: Present consolidated findings
Analysts -> FindingsReview: Submit reviewed findings

ComplianceOfficers -> IdentityProvider: Authenticate
IdentityProvider --> ComplianceOfficers: Identity confirmed
ComplianceOfficers -> FindingsReview: Approve findings for publication
FindingsReview -> GovernanceSystems: Publish approved findings
GovernanceSystems --> FindingsReview: Publication confirmed
FindingsReview -> AssessmentRecords: Store reviewed findings
FindingsReview -> AuditHistory: Record review and publication
FindingsReview --> ComplianceOfficers: Confirm findings published

== Audit review ==

Auditors -> IdentityProvider: Authenticate
IdentityProvider --> Auditors: Identity confirmed
Auditors -> AuditHistory: Review compliance assessment history
AuditHistory --> Auditors: Acquisition, assessment, review, and publication history

@enduml
